channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Teen Charged Over London Arson Attack on Jewish Charity Ambulances
item.description: An 18-year-old, Subhan Ahmed, is accused of helping set fire to four ambulances used by a Jewish volunteer group.

item.title: Smartphones linked to falling birth rates, study suggests
item.description: Researchers identify smartphones as a possible key factor in declining birth rates.

item.title: Platner seeks Maine Senate nomination; other primaries to watch
item.description: Maine Democrat Graham Platner aims to secure the nomination to challenge Republican Sen. Susan Collins in November.

item.title: Iran and Israel halt attacks after Trump urges ceasefire
item.description: Iran and Israel cease hostilities after President Trump calls for an immediate end to fighting following a major escalation.
